context: S4-S11 (8 strategies) all fail within 1-2 rebalance cycles due to stop_loss triggering prematurely. Root cause: stop_loss is checked AFTER the full monthly holding period (engine.py:454-457), not daily. Micro-cap concentrated portfolios can lose 20-30% in a single volatile month, so equity drops well below the stop threshold before the check fires. Backtest starts 2018-11-14 during the tail of the 2018 bear market, making month 1-2 returns exceptionally harsh.

execution_log.2026-06-24_FX01-FX03: First session: implemented daily stop_loss (FX01), added stop_triggered fields (FX02), recalibrated stop_loss thresholds (FX03). S5 discovered as hidden champion (+55.9% ann). 119 tests pass.
execution_log.2026-06-25_FX04: Added trailing_stop parameter to engine.run(). Trails against peak equity (not initial capital), allowing strategies to lock gains. 4 new unit tests. 123 tests pass total.
execution_log.2026-06-25_FX05: Re-assessed composite_factors conversion. S8 (uses pb/pe derived proxy) and S10 (conditional drift logic) cannot cleanly convert — ranking_fn is the correct implementation. Skipped.
execution_log.2026-06-25_FX06: Added 4 new academic template strategies (E-H): regime_momentum, sentiment_conditional, ensemble, multi_timeframe. Uses pre-computed template signals from factors/templates.py. Added 'close' and 'open' columns to factor_panel for template access. 11 new unit tests, 134 total pass.
execution_log.2026-06-25_FX08: Added robust_start_check: warns if <3 months of data or early months are declining, indicating bear-market start bias.
execution_log.2026-06-25_FX07: Full regression backtest running (19 strategies: 11 original + 4 v2 + 4 template).

engine_bug.description: stop_loss is checked AFTER `for j, date in enumerate(period_dates)` completes the full month. The daily loop at line 394-427 applies daily returns but does not check stop_loss. By the time line 455 fires, equity is already 10-15pp below the threshold.
engine_bug.impact: A -20% stop_loss can result in -30% to -40% actual loss before triggering
engine_bug.fix_location: Insert stop_loss check inside the daily loop (after line 425: equity *= (1 + portfolio_return))

phases.description: Fix the core engine bug so stop_loss triggers at the correct equity level. This alone will revive most strategies.

todos.task: Move stop_loss check INSIDE the daily loop (after line 425). When equity drops below threshold, immediately stop and track the remaining period as cash. Also add a `_stop_triggered` flag to BacktestResult so users know if/when stop fired.
todos.before: stop_loss check at line 454-457 (after monthly for-loop, monthly lag)
todos.after: stop_loss check at line ~427 (inside daily for-loop, same-day precision)
todos.test: test_engine_extras.py: add test_stop_loss_daily_precision — simulate 5-day period with -5% daily drop; verify stop fires exactly at threshold, not below

todos.task: Add `stop_triggered: bool` and `stop_trigger_date: str` to BacktestResult dataclass. Track these during engine.run() so results explicitly report if/when stop loss was hit.
todos.test: assert result.stop_triggered is True when stop fires; assert result.stop_trigger_date matches

phases.description: Even with correct daily stop_loss, -15%/-20% thresholds are too tight for 10-25 stock concentrated micro-cap portfolios (monthly vol ≈8-12%). Need n_stocks-aware threshold calibration.

todos.task: Recalibrate stop_loss for S4-S11 based on their n_stocks and expected monthly volatility. Rule of thumb: stop_loss ≥ 3 × expected_monthly_vol. For n_stocks ≤ 10: stop_loss ~ -0.35; 11-20: ~ -0.30; 21-30: ~ -0.25. Actual calibration via engine.max_drawdown_no_stop (run each strategy once without stop_loss to measure natural drawdown distribution).
todos.rationale: Concentrated micro-cap → wider stop; diversified (close to S3's 30 stocks) → can tighten. S3 (30 stocks, no stop) had -43% max drawdown as reference.

todos.task: Add `trailing_stop: Optional[float]` parameter to engine.run(). Instead of fixed stop against initial capital, trail against peak equity: `equity / peak_equity <= (1 - trailing_stop)`. This allows strategies to lock in gains while protecting against drawdowns.
todos.example: trailing_stop=0.25 means 'exit if equity drops 25% below its all-time high'. A strategy that doubles first can then protect that gain.
todos.test: test_limits.py: add test_trailing_stop — equity rises 50% then drops 25%; verify stop triggers at correct level

phases.description: S7-S11 use ranking_fn for multi-factor composites. Migrate them to the engine's native composite_factors mode for cleaner code and better testability. Also add new academic templates as separate strategies.

todos.task: Refactor S7-S11 to use `composite_factors` instead of `ranking_fn` where applicable. Ranking functions that use conditional logic (drift state, sentiment zones) still need ranking_fn. But pure multi-factor blends (S8, S10, S11) can use composite_factors+z-score. This makes the strategies more transparent and testable.

strategies_to_refactor.S7: KEEP ranking_fn — drift-regime conditional logic is non-factor-based
strategies_to_refactor.S8: CONVERT to composite_factors — profitability × low-vol is a simple 2-factor z-score composite
strategies_to_refactor.S9: KEEP ranking_fn — conditional momentum/reversal zone switching
strategies_to_refactor.S11: KEEP ranking_fn — dynamic IC-weighted weighting needs state tracking

todos.task: Add 4 new academic-template strategies to strategies_v2.py that invoke the new templates computed in `add_template_signals` (regime_momentum, sentiment_conditional, ensemble, multi_timeframe). Each strategy uses the template signal via ranking_factor. Also add `compute_templates` pipeline step that pre-computes template signals before engine run.

phases.description: After all fixes, run a comprehensive backtest and verify that (a) previously-working S1-S3 are unchanged, (b) S4-S11 now produce meaningful results, (c) new templates contribute unique alpha.

todos.task: Run full regression backtest: all 11 original + 4 v2 + 4 new template strategies. Compare pre-fix vs post-fix results. Verify S1-S3 are unchanged. Verify S4-S11 now have >12 months of returns and meaningful alpha.

validation_criteria.S4-S11: terminal_value != 0.61 or 0.70 (previously identical across all failed strategies)

todos.task: Add `robust_start_check` in engine.run(): if the first 3 months' equity curve is declining and would trigger stop_loss before month 3, emit a warning. This catches the 'backtest starts during a bear market' edge case without changing results.

dependencies.FX01 → FX02: stop_triggered fields depend on daily stop check
dependencies.FX01 → FX03: recalibrate stop_loss AFTER daily stop mechanism is in place
dependencies.FX06 → FX07: new template strategies included in final validation
dependencies.FX04: independent — can be done in parallel with FX05/FX06

risk_assessment.P0_no_regression: FX01 (daily stop loss) has zero impact on S1-S3 because S1 has stop_loss=-0.30 (wide enough to never trigger), S2 has -0.15 (barely survived), S3 has None. Changes are purely additive.
risk_assessment.P1_data_quality: All required columns (mcap, pb, pe, mom20d, mom60d, turnover, vol20d, ivol, max_ret) confirmed present in factor panel with >99% coverage except pe (72%). No column addition needed.
risk_assessment.P2_edge_case: The 2018-11 start date is historically harsh. FX08 adds a warning but does not change results.

expected_outcome.S4-S11: All 8 strategies produce meaningful multi-year results with proper stop_loss behavior
expected_outcome.new_templates: 4 academic strategies (regime_momentum, sentiment_conditional, ensemble, multi_timeframe) added and producing results
expected_outcome.engine_improvement: stop_loss is day-accurate instead of month-delayed; trailing stop option available
